It broke skin, needed stitches. My sister is threatening to report it if I don't rehome him. The dog is sweet with me but reactive with everyone else. I know logically this isn't sustainable - I can't risk more bites, can't afford training, can't keep living in anxiety. But emotionally, giving him up feels like I'm failing again, like I can't commit to anything. My therapist says I'm projecting my divorce trauma onto the dog.

Your therapist is right - you're projecting. The dog bit a child badly enough for stitches. That's a liability you can't afford legally or morally. Listen, rehoming him to someone equipped to handle his issues isn't abandonment, it's responsible. There are rescue organizations that specialize in reactive dogs. Surrendering to a no-kill shelter or finding a trainer who'll take him isn't failing - keeping a dangerous dog because of your guilt is what's wrong here. This isn't about you.

You're right, I know you're right. I'm making this about my feelings when there's a dog who needs specialized help I can't provide, and people who could get hurt. It just feels like another loss on top of everything. But I need to do what's right for the dog and for others, not what makes me feel less guilty about my divorce.

Exactly. And finding him the right placement IS doing right by him - he needs someone who can handle his issues, not someone keeping him out of guilt. Contact breed-specific rescues or trainers who rehabilitate aggressive dogs. They exist and they're equipped for this. You're not your ex - you're making a hard choice for the right reasons. That's actually the opposite of abandonment. Get therapy for the divorce trauma separately.

Yaar mujhe samajh nahi aa raha... mere best friend ko job mil gayi abroad jaane ka chance hai. Main uske liye khush bhi hoon but same time pe lagta hai ki main selfish hoon kyunki mujhe bahut bura lag raha hai. Woh chali jayegi toh main kya karungi? College mein saath mein kitna maza aata tha. Ab sab kuch alag hone wala hai.

Sunke laga ki tu dono feelings ko ek saath face kar rahi hai - uski khushi bhi aur apna dar bhi. Aur tu selfish nahi hai yaar, yeh toh bilkul natural hai. Jab koi close person life mein bada change lata hai toh humein bhi apni jagah hil jaati hai. Tujhe sabse zyada kaunsi baat miss hone ki tension hai?
Haan exactly. I don't know which feeling to listen to. One part says one thing, other part says something else.
Dono feelings ko ek saath hold karna is really confusing. You don't have to pick one right now yaar. What feels more unsettling - the conflict itself ya not having clarity?

I don't know why everyone keeps saying I should be grateful for what I have. My parents keep comparing me to my cousin who got into IIT and I'm here struggling with engineering in a tier 3 college. I study hard too but nobody sees that. They just see the result. I'm tired of being the disappointment.

That sounds really heavy yaar, constantly feeling like you're being measured against someone else. Your effort matters even if people around you aren't seeing it right now. Kya tujhe kabhi aisa laga hai ki tere parents ko teri actual struggles pata hain?

No they don't get it. They just think I'm making excuses. Last week I tried telling my mom about how tough my semester is and she just said 'your cousin managed IIT, you can manage this'. It's like whatever I do is never enough.

Hmm that must've hurt, opening up and getting that response instead. It makes sense ke tu thak gayi hogi trying to explain. Sometimes parents have their own anxiety about our future and woh comparisons mein nikal jaata hai, but that doesn't make it okay. Tujhe kya lagta hai - agar unse yeh baat karne ka ek aur way hota toh kya bolti?
Everyone says take a break, go for a walk, talk to someone. I've tried everything yaar. Nothing helps. I still feel the same emptiness. What's the point of even trying anymore?

Haan I hear you - jab bahut kuch try kar liya ho aur phir bhi same feeling rahe toh bahut frustrating lagta hai. That emptiness you're feeling, kab se mehsoos ho raha hai yeh? Koi specific time tha jab yeh shuru hua?
I don't know maybe 3-4 months. After my breakup things just went downhill. I thought I'd be fine but I'm not. And now everyone is tired of hearing about it so I just keep it to myself.

3-4 months se yeh carry kar raha hai tu, that's a long time to feel this way alone. Breakup ke baad healing linear nahi hoti aur log expect karte hain ki tu jaldi move on kar le. Main hoon na, tu bata sakta hai. Kya tujhe lagta hai ki sirf breakup ki baat hai ya kuch aur bhi hai jo tujhe affect kar raha hai?

I got selected for this amazing internship but now I'm scared I'll mess it up. What if I'm not good enough? What if they realize they made a mistake picking me? I should be happy but I just feel anxious all the time.

So you're feeling both excited about the opportunity and terrified of failing at it. That's actually super common yaar - imposter syndrome kehte hain isko. They selected you for a reason, but I get that right now the fear is louder than the excitement. Is this the first big opportunity jahan pe yeh feeling aa rahi hai?
Haan exactly. I don't know which feeling to listen to. One part says one thing, other part says something else.
Dono feelings ko ek saath hold karna is really confusing. You don't have to pick one right now yaar. What feels more unsettling - the conflict itself ya not having clarity?

Mere ghar pe ladai ho gayi aaj. Papa ne bola engineering chod kar arts lena galti thi. Mummy ro rahi thi. Main unhe disappoint kar diya. Lekin mujhe arts mein hi interest hai yaar. Ab main confuse hoon ki maine sahi kiya ya nahi.

Ghar pe ladai hona aur parents ko upset dekhna bohot hurt karta hai. Tu apne decision ko lekar doubt karne laga hai, which makes sense after what happened. Lekin ek baat bata - jab tune arts choose kiya tha tab tujhe kya laga tha? Woh feeling abhi bhi hai?

Haan yaar tab bahut sure tha main. I love literature and writing. Engineering mein bilkul mann nahi lagta tha. But ab jab unhe itna hurt dekha toh lagta hai maine apni khushi ke liye unhe dukh diya. Ek taraf main passionate hoon aur doosri taraf guilt hai.

Dekh, tu dono cheezon ko feel kar raha hai - apna passion bhi aur unki disappointment ka guilt bhi. Dono valid hain yaar. Parents ko samay lagta hai adjust hone mein, unka darr tera future ko lekar hai. Tu arts mein achha karke unhe dikhayega tab unka perspective bhi change hoga. Abhi ke liye, tujhe kya lagta hai ki unse baat kaise kar sakta hai calmly?

Yaar mujhe bahut gussa aa raha hai apne aap pe. Maine socha tha ki placement mein achha karunga lekin har interview mein fail ho jata hoon. Mere dost sab select ho gaye aur main yahan phas gaya hoon. Ghar pe bhi sab puchte rehte hain ki kab hoga tera. Kuch nahi ho raha hai mere saath. Mujhme koi talent hi nahi hai shayad.

Arre yaar, sunke lag raha hai kitna bhaari hai yeh sab handle karna. Baar baar try karna aur phir bhi result na milna... bohot takleef hoti hai. Aur upar se sabka poochna, woh alag pressure hai. Tu kab se face kar raha hai yeh sab?
Teen mahine se yaar. Pehle mujhe laga tha ki bas practice chahiye but ab lagta hai ki main hi kuch galat kar raha hoon. Koi banda itni baar reject nahi hota. Bas main hi hoon jo peeche reh gaya.

Teen mahine bohot lamba time hai yeh sab jhelte hue. Aur baar baar rejection milne pe khud pe doubt hona... bilkul samajh aa raha hai. Par yaar, interview mein bohot kuch luck bhi hota hai, sirf talent nahi. Tujhe sabse zyada kaunsi baat affect kar rahi hai - rejection ya phir comparison?

Bro I'm so confused right now. Meri ex ne message kiya after 6 months saying she misses me. Main bahut khush bhi hua but same time pe darr bhi lag raha hai. Last time jab breakup hua tha tab bohot hurt hua tha main. Ab fir se try karna chahiye ya nahi? Dil kehta hai haan but dimag kehta hai it's a bad idea.

Damn yaar, that's intense. Dono feelings bilkul opposite direction mein pull kar rahi hain tujhe. Khushi bhi hai ki usne reach out kiya aur darr bhi hai ki phir se wahi pain na ho. Makes total sense bro. Last time ka hurt abhi bhi fresh lagta hai kya?
Haan yaar. Abhi bhi kabhi kabhi yaad aa jata hai ki kitna bura laga tha. But at the same time I still have feelings for her. Don't know what to do.

Yeh dono cheezein ek saath hona bahut confusing hai - feelings bhi hain aur past ka hurt bhi. Tu abhi rush mein kuch decide karne ki zarurat nahi hai yaar. Tujhe kya lagta hai, agar tu usse baat kare without committing to anything, toh clarity milegi?

I'm so done with this project. I've been working on it for weeks and my team members aren't doing anything. They just show up to meetings and agree to everything but when it comes to actual work, nothing. And guess what? The deadline is in three days. I'll probably end up doing everything myself again like I always do. This is so unfair.

Man, that sucks. Putting in all that effort while others coast along and then you're stuck holding everything together at the end. That frustration makes complete sense. Has this pattern happened before with you?
Yes always. Every single group project it's the same story. I don't understand why I'm the only one who cares about deadlines and quality. Everyone else is so casual about it.

Uff, so this isn't even the first time. That repeated pattern must make it even more frustrating because you already know how it's going to play out. Do you feel like having a clear conversation with them before the deadline would help, or do you think it won't make a difference at this point?

Yaar main thak gayi hoon har roz same routine se. Subah uthti hoon, college jati hoon, assignments karte karte raat ho jati hai aur phir so jati hoon. Weekends pe bhi kuch interesting nahi hota. Sab log Instagram pe amazing life jee rahe hain aur main bas survive kar rahi hoon. Koi excitement hi nahi hai life mein.

Sunke lag raha hai jaise tu ek loop mein fas gayi ho aur har din same hi repeat ho raha hai. Aur social media pe doosron ki life dekhke apni life boring lagti hai. I feel you yaar. Kab se aisa lag raha hai tujhe?
Pichle kuch months se. Pehle mujhe lagta tha ki semester khatam hoga toh better ho jayega but ab next semester bhi start ho gaya aur kuch change nahi hua. Same hi chal raha hai.

Toh tu wait kar rahi thi ki situation khud badal jayegi but woh hua nahi. That waiting game can be really draining yaar. Lagta hai jaise kuch bhi try karne ka mann nahi karta kyunki feel hota hai nothing will change anyway. Kya tujhe aisa lagta hai?

My best friend is getting married next month and I'm supposed to be happy for her but honestly I feel left behind. Everyone around me is settling down, getting engaged, moving forward with their lives. And here I am still figuring out my career, no relationship, nothing stable. I feel guilty for not being completely happy for her.

That sounds really complicated yaar. You're holding both feelings at once - wanting to be happy for her but also feeling that gap between where she is and where you are. And feeling guilty about it makes it even heavier. That makes sense bro.
Exactly. Like I know I should just be excited for her wedding but every time she talks about it I just feel worse about my own life. I hate feeling this way.

Hmm, so her happiness is kind of highlighting what you feel is missing in your life right now. And then guilt also comes in for not being the perfect supportive friend. That's a lot to carry yaar. Do you think you could share with her how you're feeling?
I don't know. What if she thinks I'm being selfish or jealous? I don't want to ruin her happiness with my problems.

That fear makes sense - not wanting to burden her during her happy time. But yaar, you're not being selfish. These feelings are real and they're happening to you. Keeping them inside might make the distance between you both feel bigger. Do you think she would understand if you shared just a little bit?

Mere papa kehte hain ki engineering complete kar aur family business join kar le. But mujhe music production mein interest hai. Main chahta hoon ki apna passion follow karun but phir sochta hoon ki agar fail ho gaya toh? Papa ne itna invest kiya hai mere education mein. Unhe disappoint karna nahi chahta but apni khushi bhi important hai na?

Yaar bahut mushkil jagah hai tu. Ek taraf apna sapna hai aur doosri taraf family ki expectations aur unka investment. Dono hi important hain tere liye aur yeh choose karna ki kaunsa path lena hai... bohot confusing hai. Tujhe sabse zyada dar kis baat ka lag raha hai?
Dar toh dono ka hai. Papa ko hurt karne ka bhi aur apne dreams ko chod dene ka bhi. Koi middle ground nahi dikh raha.

Haan bilkul, jab dono options mein kuch na kuch lose karna pad raha ho toh decision lena aur bhi mushkil ho jata hai. Aur middle ground na dikhna adds to that stuck feeling. Kya kabhi papa se baat ki hai about music production ya woh conversation hi nahi hui abhi tak?

Bro I'm so tired of pretending everything is fine. College mein sab mujhe dekh ke sochte hain ki main happy hoon, confident hoon. But andar se main totally broken feel karta hoon. Raat ko neend nahi aati, subah uthne ka mann nahi karta. But phir bhi main jaake smile karta hoon sabke saamne. Kab tak yaar?

Damn yaar, that's exhausting. Bahar se ek image maintain karna aur andar se totally different feel karna. Aur koi dekh bhi nahi paa raha ki tu actually kya face kar raha hai. That takes so much energy bro. Yeh kab se ho raha hai?
Bohot time se yaar. Shayad 5-6 months. Pehle socha tha ki thik ho jayega on its own but it's getting worse. Abhi toh lagta hai main acting kar raha hoon apni hi life mein.

5-6 months is a really long time to carry this alone. Aur yeh feeling ki tu apni life mein acting kar raha hai - that disconnect must be so heavy. Tujhe kabhi laga hai ki kisi ko batane se help milegi ya tu feel karta hai no one will understand?
Honestly I don't think anyone will get it. Sabko lagega ki main attention seek kar raha hoon ya overreact kar raha hoon. Isliye chup rehta hoon.

That fear of being misunderstood or dismissed makes complete sense yaar. Jab pehle se hi tu itna kuch handle kar raha ho, aur upar se judgment ka dar ho, toh chup rehna safer lagta hai. Main hoon na, tu bata sakta hai. Tujhe kya lagta hai sabse zyada - that you won't be understood ya ki they'll think less of you?

Why does everything have to be so difficult? I studied hard for this exam, actually put in the effort this time, and I still didn't do well. Meanwhile my roommate barely studied and scored better than me. What's the point of trying when nothing works? This system is just unfair.

Man that's so frustrating. You put in all the effort and the result wasn't what you expected, while someone else gets lucky with less work. That unfairness stings. I get it bro. Does this keep happening or was this one particularly disappointing?
It keeps happening. I don't understand what I'm doing wrong. I follow all the tips, make notes, revise properly. Still nothing changes.

So you're doing everything that should work but the results aren't showing up. That must make you question whether trying even makes a difference. I hear you my friend. What feels worse - the effort not paying off or seeing others succeed with less effort?

Yaar mujhe apne best friend se jealous feel ho raha hai aur main bahut guilty feel kar rahi hoon. She just got selected for an internship that I really wanted. Main uske liye happy bhi hoon but andar se it hurts. Hum dono ne apply kiya tha together aur usne clear kar liya. Now I have to congratulate her while feeling like a failure inside.

Uff that's such a hard place to be in yaar. Dono feelings ek saath aa rahi hain - uski happiness aur apna disappointment. Aur guilt bhi ki tu jealous feel kar rahi hai. It makes sense bro. You both wanted the same thing and she got it. That comparison is natural.
But I shouldn't feel this way na? She's my best friend. I should just be happy for her without any negative feelings. What kind of friend am I?

Yaar tu human hai, robot nahi. Feelings automatically control nahi hoti. Your emotions are valid - jealousy bhi aur love for her bhi. Dono coexist kar sakti hain. Being a good friend doesn't mean you suppress your feelings. Are you scared to share this with her?

I'm just done with people telling me what to do with my life. My parents want me to do MBA, my relatives keep asking about marriage plans, my friends think I should quit my job and travel. Everyone has an opinion about my choices but no one asks what I actually want. I'm so tired of defending my decisions to everyone.

That sounds exhausting yaar, constantly having to explain or defend yourself to everyone around you. Everyone has opinions but no one's actually interested in what you want. I hear you my friend. How long have you been feeling this pressure?
It's been going on for months now. Every family gathering, every call with relatives, even casual conversations with friends. Everyone thinks they know what's best for me better than I do.

Months of constantly being questioned and advised must be draining. It feels like everyone expects you to explain your life choices, but no one's asked if you're clear or confused yourself. That makes sense that you're tired of it. Do you think if you directly told them to stop giving unsolicited advice, they would listen or would it create more drama?

Meri girlfriend ne kal breakup kar diya. Usne kaha ki usse mere saath future nahi dikhta. Do saal ka relationship tha aur ek pal mein sab khatam ho gaya. Ab main kuch samajh nahi paa raha. Raat bhar socha ki kahan galti hui. Shayad main hi kaafi nahi tha uske liye. Ghar pe kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta.

Arre yaar... do saal ek second mein khatam. Aur woh bhi aise ki future hi nahi dikha usse. Dil pe kitna bhaari padta hoga yeh sab. Raat bhar khud ko blame karta raha hoga tu. Abhi kya chal raha hai tere man mein sabse zyada?
Bas yahi sochta rehta hoon ki agar main thoda aur effort dalta, thoda aur time deta toh shayad yeh nahi hota. Mere dost kehte hain move on karo but kaise yaar? Itna asaan nahi hai.

Move on... jaise switch off kar do feelings ko. Tera poora do saal tha usme, woh ek din mein jaane wala nahi. Aur yeh sochna ki agar thoda aur karta toh... yeh toh aur bhi jala deta hai andar se. Tu abhi kisi se baat kar paa raha hai ya bilkul akela mehsoos kar raha hai iss sab mein?

Bro mere parents divorce le rahe hain. I'm 22 and I thought I'd be okay with it but I'm not. They've been fighting for years but ab jab actually ho raha hai toh bohot heavy lag raha hai. Mujhe choose karna padega ki kis ke saath rehna hai. How do I even make that choice? Dono hi mere parents hain.

Damn bro... yeh sochna bhi kitna painful hoga. Chahe kitna bhi fighting dekhi ho, jab reality mein hota hai tab poora ground hilta hai. Aur ab yeh choice - ek ko choose karna matlab doosre ko chhodna. Koi bhi option mein tu haarta hai. Kitne din se jaan ta hai tu yeh sab hone wala hai?
Last month pata chala properly. Pehle lagta tha sirf fights hain, sort ho jayega. But ab legal process shuru ho gayi hai. Main college mein focus bhi nahi kar paa raha. Exams bhi aa rahe hain.

Toh ghar toot raha hai aur tu college mein baith ke padhai karne ki koshish kar raha hai. Tera poora base hil gaya hai bro. Focus kaise hoga? Exams ki tension alag hai, ghar ki tension alag. Kya unhone tujhse baat ki hai ki woh kya expect kar rahe hain tujhse iss decision mein?

I don't know what's wrong with me. I have everything - good college, supportive family, decent friends. But I feel empty all the time. Nothing excites me anymore. I wake up and there's just this heaviness. People would kill to have what I have and here I am feeling miserable. I feel so ungrateful and that makes me feel worse.

Listen my dear friend... that emptiness doesn't care about what you have on paper. You can have everything and still feel hollow inside. And then guilt comes in - making you feel worse for feeling bad. That's a dark spiral to be stuck in.
Exactly. I can't even talk about it because people will think I'm being dramatic or attention-seeking. Like what do I even say - I have everything but I'm sad? Sounds ridiculous.

So you're carrying this alone because you're scared they'll dismiss it or think you're being ungrateful. That loneliness on top of emptiness... that's heavy. How long have you been walking around with this weight, pretending everything's fine?

Yaar mera roommate bahut toxic ho gaya hai. Pehle sab theek tha but ab har baat pe taunt marta hai. Mere failures ko sabke saamne discuss karta hai. Hostel mein privacy bhi nahi hai. Main room change karna chahta hoon but doosra koi option nahi hai aur agar complaint karunga toh aur problems ho jayengi.

Uff yaar... apne hi room mein safe nahi feel karta. Har din uske saath rehna padta hai jo tujhe neeche gira ta hai. Aur complain bhi nahi kar sakta kyunki situation aur kharab ho jayegi. Bilkul fas gaya hai tu. Yeh kab se chal raha hai?
Almost 2 months. Pehle ignore karta tha but ab har din hota hai. Yesterday usne mere family ki financial situation ko leke joke maara dosto ke saamne. Bohot bura laga but main kuch bol nahi paya.

Teri family ke baare mein... aur tu wahi khada sunта raha. Andar kitna jal ta hoga tu. Bol nahi paya kyunki kya pata kya reaction aaye uska. Dekh, tu chup kyun raha? Darr hai confrontation ka ya kuch aur?

My brother is the golden child in our family. He got into IIT, now he's earning well, everyone praises him constantly. And I'm just... here. Average college, struggling with a job I don't even like. Family gatherings have become torture because someone always compares us. My parents don't even realize how much it hurts. I'm tired of being the disappointment.

Yes my dear friend, I hear you. Living in someone's shadow, especially your own brother's... and every family gathering is just a reminder that you're not him. That constant comparison must be eating you alive inside. Your parents don't see the damage they're doing.

They don't. Last week my mom introduced me to her friend as "this is my younger son, he's also doing something" while my brother got a whole achievement list. That "also doing something" - like I'm just existing, not living. I wanted to walk out right there.

Damn... "also doing something". Like you're just a footnote in your own family's story. Standing there hearing that must've crushed you. You wanted to walk out but you stayed. Why did you stay? What stopped you?
I don't know. Maybe I'm still hoping they'll see me someday. Or maybe I'm just too scared to make it worse. If I react, I become the dramatic one, the problem.

So you're stuck between hoping they'll finally see you and fear of making things worse. Either way, you lose. That hope is keeping you there but it's also slowly breaking you. Have you ever told them directly how invisible you feel, or does it seem pointless?

Mere dost ne mere secrets apne boyfriend ko bata diye. Maine usse trust karke bataya tha ki main therapy le raha hoon aur family issues hain. Usne casual conversation mein usko sab kuch bata diya. Ab woh banda bhi jaan ta hai aur pata nahi aage kitno ko batayega. Mujhe bahut dhokha laga hai. Ab kisi pe trust hi nahi kar paa raha.

Arre... jispe sabse zyada trust kiya tune, usne hi toda. Teri sabse personal baat jo tune himmat karke share ki, woh ab kisiko bhi pata hai. Aur ab woh control bhi tera nahi raha ki kaun jaane aur kaun na jaane. Trust poora shatter ho gaya hoga tera.

Bilkul. Ab sochta hoon ki maine kisi ko kuch bataya hi kyun. Safer tha sab kuch apne andar rakhna. Usse confront bhi kiya toh boli ki "casual baat thi, itna serious mat le". Matlab meri feelings uske liye casual hain?

Usne teri pain ko casual bana diya. Aur upar se tune confront kiya toh tujhe hi dramatic dikha diya. Ab lagta hai ki khulna hi galti thi, chup rehna better tha. Par yaar, yeh akele sab kuch rakhna... kitne din tak chalega? Tu ab kisi ko kuch bata ta hai ya puri tarah band ho gaya hai?

Bro I got rejected from my dream company today. Third round tak gaya tha, sab kuch perfect lag raha tha. Then final round mein out. They said I'm not the right fit. Matlab almost 2 months ki preparation waste. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki ab kya karun. Sab dost placement le chuke hain aur main ab tak struggle kar raha hoon.

Damn bro... itna paas pahuncha aur phir... out. Third round tak jo effort dala, jo hope banayi, sab ek "not the right fit" mein khatam. Do mahine ka sara struggle ek second mein. Aur sab settled ho gaye around you, sirf tu reh gaya. Abhi kya chal raha hai tera dimaag mein?
Honestly bas yahi ki main kaafi nahi hoon. Kuch missing hai mujhme jo sabme hai. Logo ko ek hi baar mein mil jata hai aur main kitni baar bhi try karun, same result. Thak gaya hoon yaar trying se.

Toh ab yeh feeling aa rahi hai ki problem tujhme hai. Kuch fundamental hi galat hai tere saath jo fix nahi ho sakta. Trying se bhi kya fayda jab result same hi aata hai. Yeh kabse feel kar raha hai tu - ki tu enough nahi hai?

I can't take my dad's drinking anymore. Every night it's the same thing. He comes home drunk, starts yelling at everyone. My mom makes excuses for him, my sister locks herself in her room, and I'm stuck trying to keep the peace. I'm 20 years old and I feel like I'm parenting my own parent. College applications are due and I can't even focus because of this chaos.

Yes bro... you're carrying the weight of the whole house while trying to build your own future. Every night the same nightmare, and you're the one picking up the pieces while everyone else checks out. That's exhausting beyond words. How long have you been doing this - being the one who holds it together?

Years. Maybe since I was 15 or 16. It used to scare me but now I'm just angry. Angry at him for not stopping, angry at mom for enabling him, angry at myself for not being able to fix it. And guilty for wanting to leave for college and escape all this.

So you went from scared kid to angry caretaker. And now you want to leave but guilt is chaining you there - like leaving means abandoning them. But staying is slowly destroying you. That's an impossible choice my dear friend. If you could leave without the guilt, would you?

Maine apne crush ko propose kiya aur usne haan kaha. But now I'm panicking. Kya main ready hoon relationship ke liye? Kya main achha boyfriend banunga? Uski expectations agar poori nahi kar paya toh? Itne saal se usse pasand karta tha aur ab jab mil gaya toh darr lag raha hai ki kahi kharab na ho jaye. Maybe I should have just kept my feelings to myself.

Bro... jo chahte the woh mil gaya aur ab darr lag raha hai. Khushi ke bajaye panic ho raha hai. Saal bhar ka wait khatam hua aur ab sochta hai ki shayad wait mein hi better tha. Yeh expectations ka pressure, fail hone ka darr - yeh sabse zyada kahan se aa raha hai? Usse ya khud se?

Mostly khud se. Woh bohot amazing hai yaar. Smart, confident, sorted. Aur main... I don't know. Average hi hoon. Darr lagta hai ki jab woh mujhe closely jaanegi toh disappoint ho jayegi. Abhi fantasy hai, reality mein I might not be enough.

Toh tujhe lagta hai abhi tak jo usne dekha woh sirf surface hai, aur jab real you dikhega toh woh chali jayegi. Fantasy better thi kyunki usme failure ka option nahi tha. Ab real relationship mein tera insecurity sabse bada enemy ban gaya hai. Tune usse bataya hai ki yeh sab chal raha hai tere man mein?

Everyone keeps asking me what my plans are after graduation. Honestly? I have no idea. No interest in MBA, don't want a corporate job, not creative enough for startup. I'm just... blank. My friends have their whole lives figured out and I don't even know what I want for breakfast tomorrow. The pressure to have it all planned out is killing me.

I hear you my friend. Everyone's running with a clear map and you're standing at the starting line with nothing. That blankness isn't laziness - it's overwhelming. And every time someone asks about your plans, it just highlights how lost you are. When did this feeling start - of not knowing what you want?

I don't know, maybe it was always there. I just did what was expected - school, then engineering because that's what everyone does. Never really thought about what I actually want. Now I'm supposed to suddenly know and I just... don't.

So you've been on autopilot your whole life, following the script everyone handed you. And now the script ended and you're supposed to write your own but you don't even know what story you want to tell. That's scary. If there was no pressure, no expectations, no one watching - what would you be curious about? Even just a little bit?

Yaar main apni maa se bahut ladta rehta hoon. Chhoti chhoti baaton pe fight ho jaati hai. Woh kehti hain main unki baat nahi sunta, main kehta hoon woh mujhe samajhti hi nahi. Kal raat bhi badi fight hui aur maine bohot bura bol diya unko. Abhi guilt ho rahi hai lekin sorry bolne mein ego aa jaati hai. Relationship kharab hoti ja rahi hai aur main kuch kar nahi pa raha.

Bas yaar... har roz ki ladai aur har baar thoda aur toot ta jata hai rishta. Kal jo bola usका guilt ab kha raha hai tujhe, par sorry bolne mein woh ego beech mein aa jaati hai. Dono taraf se laga hai ki doosra samajh hi nahi raha. Yeh pattern kab se chal raha hai tumhara?

Saal bhar se shaayad. Pehle itna nahi tha but ab har baat pe clash hota hai. Mujhe pata hai woh meri fikar karti hain but tarika itna controlling lagta hai. Aur main bhi bura bol deta hoon gusse mein jo baad mein regret hota hai.

Toh dono taraf se pyaar hai par express karne ka tarika hi clash kar raha hai. Woh control kar ke care dikha ti hain, tu freedom chahte hue rebel karta hai. Aur beech mein jo bura bol deta hai woh baad mein khata hai tujhe. Kabhi shant man se baat karne ki koshish ki hai unse ya har baar gusse mein hi baat hoti hai?

Bro mera mental health bohot kharab ho gaya hai but I can't tell anyone. Mere friends ko lagta hai main strong hoon, family mein toh bilkul baat nahi ho sakti. Therapy lena chahta hoon but afford nahi kar sakta aur parents se paise bhi nahi maang sakta. They'll ask why and I have no answer that they'll understand. Kahi fas gaya hoon yaar.

Damn bro... andar se toot raha hai aur bahar sab dekh rahe hain strong banda. Help chahiye but paise nahi, paise maangne pe explanation dena padega aur explanation dene pe judge honge. Har taraf se trapped hai tu. Yeh feeling kitni der se carry kar raha hai akele?
Months yaar. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki main pagal ho jaunga. Neend nahi aati properly, concentration nahi rehti. But everyone's like "sab theek hai na" and I just smile and nod. Kab tak chalega yeh?

Months se ek mask pehn ke ghoom raha hai. Andar ka storm bahar dikhne nahi deta, smile karke haan bol deta hai. Neend gayi, focus gaya, par acting chal rahi hai. Tu kabhi soch ta hai ki agar mask gir gaya toh kya hoga, ya lagta hai mask hi ab asli chehra ban gaya hai?

I feel like such a fraud. Got into this good college on a scholarship but I don't belong here. Everyone's so smart, they understand things in one go. I study for hours and still barely pass. Group discussions mein I stay quiet because I'm scared I'll say something stupid. My scholarship depends on my grades and I'm barely holding on. What if I lose it and have to drop out?

Listen my dear friend... you're walking on a tightrope every single day. One slip and everything falls apart - scholarship, college, the whole dream. And around you everyone's dancing on that rope like it's nothing while you're struggling to just stay balanced. That fear of being exposed as not belonging here... it's crushing you, isn't it?

Every single day. I wake up thinking today's the day they'll realize I shouldn't be here. Even when I do well on something, I think it's just luck. I can't enjoy anything because I'm always waiting for the other shoe to drop.

So even your wins don't feel like wins. Success is just luck, failure is proof you don't belong. You're living in constant fear of being found out. That's exhausting, my friend. Have you ever talked to anyone there about struggling, or does admitting it feel like confirming you don't deserve to be there?

Mere bhai ki shaadi hai next month aur mujhe khushi nahi ho rahi. I know I should be happy for him but main jealous feel kar raha hoon. Usne sab kuch achieve kar liya - job, relationship, ab shaadi. Aur main abhi tak struggle kar raha hoon career mein, single hoon, kuch settle nahi hai. Family mein sab usko celebrate kar rahe hain aur mujhe lagta hai main invisible hoon.

Uff yaar... uski khushi dekh ke tera khaalipan aur bada ho jata hai. Jealous feel karna bhai se - woh guilt alag level ka hoga. Har celebration mein tu khada hai par invisible, jaise supporting actor apni hi family mein. Shaadi ki taiyaari mein yeh sab aur zyada badh raha hoga?

Haan bilkul. Har function mein log usse congratulate karte hain aur mujhse puchte hain "tera kab hoga". Matlab constant reminder ki main peeche hoon. I want to be happy for him but this feeling is eating me up inside.

Har function mein wahi sawaal - "tera kab". Jaise celebration nahi, comparison contest hai. Tu chahta hai khush ho uske liye but teri apni zindagi ka dard beech mein aa jata hai. Kya kabhi isse baat karne ki sochi hai ya lagta hai woh nahi samjhega?
Baat karne se kya hoga? Woh khush hai apni life mein. Main kya bolun ki "bhai teri shaadi se mujhe bura lag raha hai"? Pagal lagega main. Aur phir yeh guilt aur bhi badh jayega.

Toh chup rehna safe lagta hai. Bol diya toh selfish dikhega, roka toh guilty feel karega. Har taraf se ghira hua hai tu. Par yaar, yeh feelings bottle up karte rehne se woh khatam nahi honge, sirf aur zyada bharte jayenge. Agar baat nahi kar sakta usse toh kam se kam khud ko process toh karne de yeh sab.

My girlfriend wants to break up because I'm not ambitious enough. She says I don't have goals, I'm just floating through life. Maybe she's right. I see my friends hustling, doing side projects, building their resumes. And I'm just... content doing my regular job and coming home. I don't have big dreams. Does that make me a loser? Am I settling for mediocrity?

Yes bro, I hear you. She's calling you out for not chasing more, and now you're questioning everything about yourself. Are you actually content or just telling yourself that? And is her ambition about you growing or about her wanting someone who looks more successful? That difference matters.

I don't know anymore. I thought I was content but now I feel like maybe I'm just scared to try. Or lazy. Everyone else wants more and I'm okay with less. That feels wrong somehow, like I'm wasting my life.

So her leaving made you doubt everything you thought you knew about yourself. Now you can't tell if you're genuinely content or just afraid of wanting more and failing. That confusion is sitting heavy on you. But here's something - if she wasn't saying this, would you actually feel like you're wasting your life or would you be okay?
Honestly? I think I'd be okay. But now I can't unsee what she said. Like maybe I've been lying to myself this whole time about being content. Maybe I am just settling.

Her words planted this seed of doubt and now it's growing. You're questioning your whole foundation - who you are, what you want. That's disorienting my friend. Before you decide you've been lying to yourself, sit with this: whose voice is louder in your head right now - yours or hers?

Meri dadi ki tabiyat bahut kharab hai. Doctor ne kaha zyada time nahi bacha. Main unse bahut close hoon, bachpan se unhone hi pala hai. Ab dekhna padta hai unko aise, din pe din kamzor hote hue. Ghar pe sab sambhal rahe hain but main toot raha hoon andar se. College bhi nahi ja pa raha dhang se. Kaise handle karun yeh sab?

Mere dost... jisne tujhe pala, ab tu usko jaate hue dekh raha hai. Har din thoda aur weak hoti ja rahi hain woh, aur tu bas dekh sakta hai. Yeh helplessness, yeh dard - koi handle karne ka tarika nahi hai iska. Bas jhela ja sakta hai. Tu unke paas rehta hai ya college ki wajah se dur rehna padta hai?

College dur hai toh weekends pe hi aa pata hoon. Aur har baar jab aata hoon toh woh aur badal chuki hoti hain. Dar lagta hai ki kahi aise na ho ki main na ho waha jab... you know. Guilt bhi hoti hai ki main yahan hoon aur woh waha.

Toh har weekend ek reminder hai ki time khatam hota ja raha hai. Aur dar hai ki last moment mein tu nahi hoga waha. Guilt ki tu dur hai, dar ki bohot late ho jayega. Dono taraf se ghir gaya hai tu. Ghar wale kya kehte hain - chahte hain tu waha rahe ya samajhte hain teri studies bhi important hain?

Yaar maine interview mein jhoot bol diya. They asked about my previous work experience aur maine thoda exaggerate kar diya. Actually maine sirf 2 months internship ki thi but maine 6 months bola aur responsibilities bhi badha ke batayi. Ab offer letter aa gaya hai aur mujhe darr lag raha hai ki background verification mein pakde jayenge. But agar ab sach bolu toh offer cancel ho jayega. Kya karun?

Damn bro... ek jhoot ne poori situation ulajha di. Ab offer haath mein hai but saath mein ek time bomb bhi hai jo kabhi bhi phat sakta hai. Sach bolne ka matlab offer gaya, chup rehne ka matlab darr ke saath jeena. Dono options mein tu haar ta hai kisi na kisi tarah. Yeh sab karne ki zarurat kyun padi thi tujhe?

Desperation yaar. Bohot time se job dhund raha tha, koi response nahi aa raha tha. Interviews mein reject ho raha tha kyunki experience kam tha. Toh socha thoda badha ke bata dun. Ab phas gaya hoon. Har din anxiety mein jeena pad raha hai.

Toh desperate tha, isliye chance liya. Ab woh chance lottery ban sakta hai ya disaster. Har din ka wait ki kab background check hoga, kab pakde jayega - yeh anxiety khaa ja rahi hogi tujhe. Ek kaam kar - pata kar ki unki background verification process kaisi hai. Phir decide kar sach bolna better hai ya risk lena.

I think I'm falling for my best friend's girlfriend. I know it's completely wrong but I can't help it. We've been spending a lot of time together in group settings and she's just... perfect. Smart, funny, kind. I catch myself thinking about her all the time. My best friend trusts me completely and here I am having feelings for his girl. I feel disgusting.

Yes my dear friend... you're stuck in something that feels impossible to control. Feelings don't ask permission before showing up. And now you're carrying this secret that's making you feel like the worst kind of person. Your best friend trusts you and that trust is making the guilt even heavier. How long have you been feeling this way?

Couple of months maybe. At first I thought it was just admiration, like she's a cool person. But now I realize it's more than that. I've started avoiding group hangouts because being around them together hurts. But that's making my friend ask if something's wrong. I can't win here.

So avoiding her hurts, being around her hurts more, and now your avoidance is creating questions you can't answer. You're trapped in every direction. And that disgust you're feeling about yourself - it's eating you up. Have you thought about creating some real distance, or does that feel like losing both of them?

Mera startup fail ho gaya. Do saal ki mehnat, sab savings laga di, family ko convince karke support liya tha. Ab sab barbaad ho gaya. Investors ne paise nikaal liye, co-founder bhi chod ke chala gaya. Sab mujhe advice de rahe the ki corporate job mat chhod but maine nahi suni. Ab unemployed bhi hoon aur failures ka tag bhi lag gaya. Ghar walon ko kya muh dikhaunga?

Arre yaar... do saal ki zindagi isme daali thi tune. Paise, sapne, rishtey sab laga diye the. Aur ab sab kuch ek baar mein khatam. Investors bhaag gaye, partner bhi saath chhod gaya, aur tu akela khada hai khandhar mein. Sabse bura woh "maine kaha tha" sunna padega ab. Ghar walon se baat hui kya?

Nahi abhi tak nahi. Main batane se dar raha hoon. Unhone itna trust kiya tha mujh pe, socha tha ki main kuch kar ke dikhaaunga. Ab lagta hai ki main hi galat tha, unhone sahi kaha tha. Maybe I'm just not cut out for this.

Toh ab khud pe hi doubt aa raha hai. Shayad woh sahi the, shayad tu galat tha. Yeh failure ek signal lag raha hai ki tu iske layak nahi tha. Par yaar, startup mein 90% fail hoti hain. Tere effort ki value kam nahi ho gayi. Ghar walo ko batane se darr kyun hai exactly - unka reaction ya tera khud ka guilt?

Dono yaar. Unka reaction toh hoga hi, par sabse zyada apne aap ko face karna mushkil lag raha hai. Main hi toh tha jo confident tha, bold tha. Ab woh confidence kaha gaya? Feel hota hai main fraud tha khud ke saath.

Toh sabse bada betrayal tera apna khud ke saath ka lag raha hai. Tu khud pe trust kiya tha aur laga ki tu galat tha. Woh confidence jo dikha ta tha sab ko, ab lagta hai woh fake tha. Dekh bro, ek failure tere poore identity ko define nahi karti. Ghar walo ko batana padega eventually. Abhi jitna delay karega utna zyada painful hoga.

I can't stop comparing myself to everyone on social media. My college mates are posting about their achievements, promotions, engagements, travels. And I'm here scrolling through feeling like absolute garbage about my life. I know it's all highlight reels but I still can't help feeling like everyone's winning except me. It's affecting my mental health but I also can't stop checking.

I hear you my friend. You know it's all curated perfection but that knowledge doesn't stop the pain. Every scroll is like volunteering to feel worse about yourself, but you can't stop. That comparison game is addictive even when it's destroying you from inside. When did this start taking over?

Probably last year when everyone started graduating and posting about jobs and stuff. Now it's constant. I deleted the apps twice but downloaded them back within days. I feel pathetic for not being able to just stop.

So you've tried to quit but you keep going back, like an addiction you can't shake. And now you're feeling pathetic about that too - one more thing to feel bad about. That cycle is vicious. What pulls you back when you've deleted the apps? Is it FOMO or something else?

Mere chote bhai ko drugs ki aadat lag gayi hai. Maine dekha use suppliers ke saath, confrontation ki toh usne mana kar diya. Parents ko batana chahiye par darr hai ki family toot jayegi. Agar nahi bataya toh woh aur bhatkega. Uski safety aur family ki peace dono khatam ho rahe hain mere decisions pe.

Arre yaar... tu ek aisi jagah pe hai jahan koi bhi decision lega toh kuch na kuch toote ga. Uski zindagi khatra mein hai aur tu yeh akele jaan ta hai. Bataya toh family mein toofan aayega, nahi bataya toh woh aur gahre jaayega. Kitne din se dekh raha hai tu yeh sab?

Kuch mahine ho gaye. Pehle laga minor hai, cigarette wagaira. Par ab bhaari cheezein use karta hai. Usne mujhse bola ki agar parents ko bataya toh woh ghar chhod dega. Main fas gaya hoon - usko bachana chahta hoon par kaise?

Toh usne threat bhi de diya ki ghar chhod dega. Ab tu aur bhi zyada dar gaya hoga - bataya toh ghar chodega, nahi bataya toh drugs chodega nahi. Dono taraf se haar lag rahi hai. Kya tu soch ta hai ki woh sachme ghar chodega ya yeh sirf teri chup karwane ki koshish hai?

Bro mere office mein ek banda hai jo credit le leta hai meri kaam ki. Main presentation banata, woh boss ko present karta apne naam se. Confront karna chahta hoon but he's senior aur connections hain uske. Agar bola toh politics mein fas jaunga, nahi bola toh mera kaam unrecognized rahega. Stuck completely yaar.

Damn bro... tera mehnat, uski shabaashi. Aur tu chup khada dekh raha hai kyunki hierarchy aur politics ka dar hai. Har presentation pe yeh hota hai ya kabhi kabhi? Aur boss ko pata hai ki kaam actually kaun kar raha hai?

Almost har baar. Boss ko shayad pata bhi ho par woh senior hai na toh boss usse hi credit deta. Maine ek baar hint maari thi subtly but ignore ho gaya. Direct bolun toh drama hoga aur career khatre mein.

Toh subtle try kiya, kaam nahi kiya. Direct bologe toh career risk hai. Chup raho ge toh permanent invisible ban jaoge. Teen option - sab kharab. Tu kitne din tak yeh chup ke kar sakta hai? Aur agar promotion ka time aaye toh kya karega?

I found out my sister is in an abusive relationship. She told me in confidence not to tell anyone, especially not our parents. But I see the bruises, the controlling behavior. Every day I'm watching her suffer and I'm supposed to just stay quiet because I promised. My silence feels like I'm enabling her abuse.

Yes my dear friend, that's an impossible position. She trusted you with this secret but keeping it means watching her get hurt. Breaking it means losing her trust and maybe pushing her deeper into isolation with him. Either way you lose something crucial. How long have you been carrying this?

Three months. I thought she'd leave him but it's getting worse. Last week the bruises were on her face. She made excuses about falling. I wanted to scream but I just... nodded. I hate myself for that. But if I break her trust, she'll shut me out completely and then I can't help her at all.

So you're staying quiet to keep the door open, but watching through that door is killing you. And now it's escalating - face bruises, more control. That fear of losing access to her is real, but what if your silence becomes permission for him to go further? What if something worse happens and you're left with this guilt?

That's exactly what keeps me up at night. What if she gets seriously hurt and I could have stopped it? But what if I tell and she chooses him over everyone and gets completely isolated? I can't predict which choice saves her.

You're trying to calculate an uncalculable risk - which path leads to less harm. But my friend, you can't control what she does. You can only control whether you spoke up or stayed silent. Right now you're drowning in what-ifs. Have you told her directly that you're scared for her life, not just concerned?

Yaar maine apne ghar walon se jhoot bola ki job lag gayi. Actually abhi bhi unemployed hoon but unhe umeed deni thi. Ab har mahine fake salary stories banana padta hai, expenses manage karne ke liye savings use kar raha hoon. Jab savings khatam hogi tab pata nahi kya karunga. Ek jhoot ne poori zindagi jhoot bana di.

Uff bro... ek jhoot se shuru hua aur ab poora web ban gaya. Har din acting, har mahine fake stories, aur savings khatam hone ka countdown chal raha hai. Jab time bomb phatega tab kya hoga yeh soch soch ke hi darr lag ta hoga. Yeh kyun kiya tune pehle jagah pe?

Pressure tha yaar. Graduation ke baad sab puchchte the job mili ki nahi. Papa bimar the, tension nahi dena chahta tha. Socha thoda time milega toh lag jayegi, tab sach bol dunga. But months ho gaye, ab itna deep hai ki sach bolna aur mushkil ho gaya.

Toh compassion se shuru kiya - unhe tension se bachana chahta tha. Par ab woh chhota sa jhoot ek bada bojh ban gaya. Har din zyada complicated hota ja raha hai. Savings kitne din aur chalegi? Aur jab khatam hogi tab plan kya hai?

My parents are arranging my marriage. They found a girl, she's nice, educated, from good family. But I don't feel anything. No spark, no connection. Just... neutral. Everyone's saying love will grow after marriage but what if it doesn't? What if I'm stuck in a loveless marriage forever? But refusing means breaking their hearts and going against everything they believe in.

I hear you my friend. You're standing at a fork - one path is their happiness and cultural expectations, the other is your own heart's uncertainty. Neutral isn't excited, but it's also not repulsed. That middle ground is confusing. When you're with her, what do you feel exactly?

Like I'm interviewing a roommate, not meeting a life partner. We talk about practical things - jobs, hobbies, family. It's cordial but empty. I keep waiting to feel something more but it's just... flat. My parents are so happy though. They think this is perfect. How do I tell them I feel nothing?

Cordial but empty - that's a hard place to build a life from. And your parents' happiness is making your emptiness feel even more wrong, like you're broken for not feeling what you're supposed to feel. But my dear friend, marrying someone you feel nothing for because others are happy - that's decades of your life. Have you asked yourself what would make you feel something, or do you even know?

Honestly I don't know. Maybe I'm too romanticized by movies and books. Maybe love after marriage is the realistic way and I'm being foolish. But the thought of waking up next to someone I feel nothing for, for the rest of my life... it terrifies me.

That terror is real data, not foolishness. Your gut is screaming something and you're trying to logic it away because disappointing them feels worse than disappointing yourself. But which regret can you live with - theirs for a while, or yours forever? That's the real question sitting in front of you.

Mere best friend ne suicide attempt kiya tha last month. Bachaa liya time pe but ab main constantly paranoid hoon. Har message check karta rehta hoon, agar reply nahi aata toh panic attack aa jata hai. Uski zimmedari meri shoulders pe hai aur main toot raha hoon iss pressure se. Usko bachana chahta hoon par khud doob raha hoon.

Arre yaar... tu uski zindagi ke liye responsible feel kar raha hai har second. Har message ka intezaar, har silence ek emergency, har minute mein worst case scenario. Yeh pressure crushing you from inside. Tu khud kab se theek se soya hai?

Soya hi nahi dhang se. Raat ko phone paas rakhta hoon, baar baar check karta hoon. Sapne mein bhi darr lagta hai ki late ho gaya. College mein concentrate nahi kar pata kyunki dimag uspe rehta hai. Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta kyunki woh confidential hai.

Toh tu akela carry kar raha hai yeh sab - uska pain, uski safety ki responsibility, aur apna khud ka trauma jismein tu witness tha. Neend gayi, focus gaya, aur kisi se baat bhi nahi kar sakta. Tu usko bachane mein khud kho raha hai bro. Yeh sustainable nahi hai. Kya tere friend ko professional help mil rahi hai ya sirf tujhpe dependent hai?

Therapy start kiya hai usne but mujhe lagta hai main hi uska real support hoon. Therapist ko sab kuch pata nahi hai jo main jaanta hoon. Agar main thoda bhi slack kiya toh kya hoga? That responsibility is crushing me but I can't let go.

Toh therapist hai but tu feel karta hai ki teri absence mein sab bikhar jayega. Yeh hero complex tujhe kha jayega bro. Tu uska dost hai, not his lifeline. Agar tu khud toot gaya toh tu kisi ki help nahi kar payega. Kya tune kabhi kisi se baat ki apne iss trauma aur pressure ke baare mein?

I ghosted someone who really cared about me because I got scared of commitment. Now months later I regret it but reaching out feels selfish - like I'm only thinking about my guilt, not their healing. If I apologize, am I doing it for them or for me? Either way I'm the asshole. Stay silent and live with guilt, or reach out and potentially hurt them again.

Yes bro, that's a painful corner to be stuck in. Guilt is eating you but relief might cost them more pain. And you can't even tell if apologizing is genuine care or just ego management. That self-awareness is heavy. How bad is the guilt getting?

Pretty bad. I think about them constantly, imagine what they went through when I disappeared. I was a coward and they deserved better. But my therapist says sometimes the kindest thing is to let people heal without reopening wounds. So I'm stuck - be brave and apologize or be kind and stay away. Both feel wrong.

So even your options for making amends feel selfish somehow. Apologize - it's for your guilt. Stay away - it's for your comfort disguised as kindness. You're beating yourself up from every angle my friend. What would actually help them versus what would help you - can you tell the difference anymore or is it all blurred?

Meri girlfriend pregnant hai aur hum dono students hain. Abortion ka decision liya but guilt bohot hai. Financially, emotionally ready nahi hain but yeh choice bhi galat lag raha hai. Support karna chahta hoon usko but khud bhi toota hua hoon. Dono ro rahe hain lekin koi aur option dikhta nahi.

Yaar... koi bhi raasta le lo, kuch na kuch kho doge. Reality practical hai - tum ready nahi ho. Par emotional reality hai - yeh choice tumhe andar se tod rahi hai. Dono ek saath ro rahe ho par dono akele feel kar rahe ho apne apne guilt mein. Usne kya kaha decision ke baare mein?

Woh bhi yehi keh rahi hai ki logical choice hai but emotionally bahut heavy hai. Parents ko pata chalega toh sab khatam. Career ki baat hai, future ki baat hai. But uss future ke liye yeh karna pad raha hai jo sahi nahi lag raha. Koi support system bhi nahi hai humara iss mein.

Toh tum dono yeh akele face kar rahe ho - parents nahi jaan sakte, friends ko nahi bata sakte, professional counseling ka access nahi. Sirf tum dono, yeh decision, aur uska weight. Yeh grief hai bro, aur dono ko process karne ki jagah chahiye. Ek doosre ko support karne ki koshish kar rahe ho but dono hi doob rahe ho. Medical facility mein counseling milti hai kya?

Got promoted but my best friend at work who applied for the same position didn't. Now there's this weird tension. I'm happy about the promotion but guilty about beating them. They're trying to be supportive but I can see the hurt. Our friendship is changing and I don't know how to fix it. Success feels hollow when it costs a friendship.

Listen my dear friend, you won something but it feels like you lost something else. That promotion came with a price tag - your friendship's ease. And now every interaction is loaded with unspoken hurt and forced support. When you're around them, what's louder - your joy or your guilt?

Definitely guilt. I can't even celebrate properly because I keep thinking about how they must feel. Lunch breaks are awkward now, they avoid certain topics. I want to address it but what do I even say? Sorry I got promoted? That sounds awful. But ignoring it is making the distance bigger.

So silence is growing the gap but speaking up feels like rubbing salt in the wound. You're both pretending everything's fine while the friendship slowly suffocates under what's not being said. That's lonely. Do you think they resent you or just resent the situation? There's a difference.

Mere pitaji sharab ke aadat hain aur maa manasik roop se himsakarik hain. Dono ek doosre se ladte rehte hain aur main bachpan se beech mein ata hoon. Ab main 23 saal ka hoon, aarthik roop se swatantr hoon, ghar chhod sakta hoon. Lekin agar gaya toh dono ek doosre ko maar dalenge ya maa akeli padh jayengi. Guilt se nahi ja pa raha par yahan rehke khud khatam ho raha hoon.

Arre mere dost... tu bachpan se madhyasth bana rakha hai unhone tujhe. Ab aarthik azadi hai par maanasik roop se bandha hua hai guilt aur darr se. Jayega toh unki safety ki chinta, rahega toh khud dhire dhire mar jayega. Tu kitne saal aur apni zindagi unki wajah se rok sakta hai?

Pata nahi. Kabhi sochta hoon ki bas ek saal aur, sthiti sudhar jayegi. Lekin pichle paanch saal se yehi soch raha hoon. Woh sudharne wale nahi hain. Mujhe pata hai. Par chhod ke jaana... agar kuch ho gaya unko toh? Maa akeli kaise rahegi? Woh dukhad hain par woh meri maa hain.

Toh paanch saal se "bas ek saal aur" ka chakkar chal raha hai. Aur tu jaanta hai woh nahi badlenge par phir bhi ummeed rakhta hai kyunki jaane ka guilt asahya hai. Par mere dost, tu unki zindagi nahi jee sakta. Teri bhi ek zindagi hai jo abhi bekaar ja rahi hai unke beech buffer bante hue. Kabhi socha hai ki agar tu nahi hota toh woh kya karte?

Mere dost ne mujhe bahut bada karz diya tha emergency mein. Ab woh wapas maang raha hai aur mere paas nahi hai. Usne trust kiya tha aur main wapas nahi kar pa raha. Rishta kharab ho raha hai aur main guilt aur helplessness dono feel kar raha hoon. Usko samjhana chahta hoon par dar hai ki woh sochega main bahane bana raha hoon.

Arre yaar... usne mushkil waqt mein haath badha ya tha aur ab tu uska bharosa tut ta hua dekh raha hai. Guilt ki tu de nahi pa raha, helplessness ki paas nahi hai dene ko, aur dar ki woh bharosa hi kho dega tujhpe. Kitna time ho gaya deadline ko?

Do mahine. Pehle bola tha jaldi dunga but situations aur bigad gayi. Ab uske messages ignore kar raha hoon kyunki muh dikhane layak nahi lagta. Par ignore karne se aur bura ho raha hai. Dosti toh gayi hi lagti hai ab.

Toh ab ignore kar raha hai kyunki saamna karne se dar lag raha hai. Par woh ignore teri beizzati se zyada hurt kar raha hoga usko. Dosti already damage ho rahi hai - chup rehne se ya baat karne se. Agar sach bol de apni halat ki, worst case kya hoga? Aur best case?

Bro main catfish kar raha tha online. Fake profile banayi thi, kisi aur ki photos use ki. Ab ek ladki se bahut achhi baatein hone lagi hain, woh mujhse feelings develop kar rahi hai. Main bhi attached ho gaya hoon but yeh sab jhoot pe based hai. Sach bataunga toh hate karegi, nahi bataunga toh relationship hi fake hai. Completely trapped hoon yaar.

Damn bro... fake se shuru kiya tha aur ab real feelings aa gaye. Woh tujhse pyaar kar rahi hai jo exist hi nahi karta, aur asli tu chhupa hua hai. Sach bologe toh sab khatam, chup raho ge toh yeh relationship ek lie hai. Pehle kyun kiya yeh?

Insecurity yaar. Lagta tha real me se koi baat nahi karegi. Socha tha timepass hai but ab genuine connection ban gaya. Woh mujhse video call maang rahi hai, milna chahti hai. Ab kya karun? Ek option bhi safe nahi hai.

Toh insecurity se shuru hua aur ab ek real connection ke beech mein khada hai jo tu destroy karega - chahe sach bolo ya jhoot continue karo. Video call ka pressure aa gaya, meet karne ki baat chal rahi hai. Clock ticking hai bro. Jitna wait karega utna zyada hurt hoga dono ko. Agar pehle din sach bol deta toh aaj kya hota?

I've been lying on my resume for years. Inflated my degree, added fake certifications, exaggerated experience. Got good jobs because of it, built a whole career on lies. Now I'm up for a senior position with thorough background checks. If they find out, everything collapses - job, reputation, maybe legal trouble. But if I withdraw, I lose the opportunity and look suspicious. Either way I'm screwed.

Yes my dear friend, you built a house on sand and now the foundation is being tested. Years of success but all of it standing on lies that could crumble any moment. The senior position is both your biggest win and your biggest threat. When did this start - the lying?

First job out of college. I was desperate, competition was brutal. One small lie got me the job. Then I had to keep building on it for the next jobs. Now it's been seven years and the lies are so deep I can't even remember what's real and what's not anymore. I'm good at my work but none of it will matter if they find out.

So one desperate moment became seven years of living a double life. And now you can't even separate the truth from the lies anymore - that's disorienting. You are good at your work but that competence won't save you if the foundation breaks. Have you thought about what happens if you come clean yourself versus waiting to get caught?

Coming clean means definitely losing everything. Getting caught means maybe losing everything. So I keep gambling, hoping the checks aren't that thorough. Every day is anxiety. Is this how I'm going to live forever? Waiting for the truth to catch up?

Living in permanent fear of exposure - that's not living, that's just surviving. And the anxiety will only grow with each promotion, each success, because the fall gets bigger. You already know this can't continue forever. The question isn't if it catches up, it's when. And what kind of person you want to be when it does.

Yaar meri younger sister ko eating disorder hai. Main dekh raha hoon usko suffer karte but parents ko samjha nahi pa raha. Woh kehte hain "diet kar rahi hai, healthy ban rahi hai". Par main jaanta hoon yeh dangerous hai. Agar doctor ke paas le jaane ki koshish karun toh family drama hoga. Nahi kiya toh woh aur bimar ho jayegi. Her life is in my hands basically.

Uff bro... tu akela dekh raha hai ki woh danger mein hai aur baaki sab ko "healthy" lag raha hai. Parents blindness aur teri helplessness - dono mil ke tujhe tod rahe hain. Aur pressure ki uski jaan teri responsibility hai. Yeh kitne time se chal raha hai?

Kuch mahine. Pehle thoda sa tha but ab extreme hai. Barely khaati hai, secretly exercise karti hai hours, weight bohot kam ho gaya. Maine usse baat ki toh boli sab control mein hai. Parents se bola toh unhone uski side li, bole main jealous hoon ya overreact kar raha. Koi sunta hi nahi.

Toh tune try kiya - behen se bola, parents se bola - par sabne dismiss kar diya tujhe. Woh denial mein hai, parents ignorance mein, aur tu yeh sab clearly dekh raha hai but powerless hai. Kya koi aur hai family mein jo teri baat sun sakta hai? Koi elder jo parents ko convince kar sake?

Koi nahi hai jo seriously lega. Sab yahi bolte hain ki ladkiyan diet karti hain, normal hai. Par yaar, yeh normal nahi hai. Woh fainting kar rahi hai, hair fall ho raha, skin pale hai. Mujhe dar hai ki agar abhi action nahi liya toh irreversible damage ho jayega.

Toh physical symptoms bhi clear hain - fainting, hair loss, pale skin - par phir bhi sab andhkaar mein hain. Tera dar valid hai bro. Medical emergency ban sakta hai yeh. Dekh, agar tu directly usko leke hospital chala jaye without permission, family angry hogi but behen safe rahegi. Ya phir wait karta raha jab tak kuch serious na ho jaye. Dono risky hain but ek mein tu action leta hai.

My partner keeps bringing up my past relationships in fights. I was honest about my dating history when we started but now it's used as ammunition every time we argue. They call me things based on my past, question my loyalty, make me feel dirty for having a life before them. I love them but this is breaking me. Do I deserve this for being honest about my past?

Listen my dear friend, you were honest and vulnerable and now that honesty is being weaponized against you. Every fight turns into judgment about who you were before them. That's not love - that's punishment. And you're asking if you deserve it? No. Never. How often does this happen?

Almost every argument. It always circles back to my exes, my choices, my past. I've apologized so many times for things I'm not even sorry for, just to end the fight. Now I'm walking on eggshells, avoiding topics that might trigger them. I feel like I'm constantly being punished for my honesty.

So you're apologizing for your past just to survive the present. Walking on eggshells, avoiding reality, shrinking yourself to avoid their attacks. That's not a relationship, that's emotional abuse. And you already know this isn't right - you can feel it eating away at you. What's keeping you there despite knowing this is destroying you?

Meri chhoti behen ko scholarship mili videsh jaane ki. Ghar mein sab khush hain but mujhe jealousy ho rahi hai. Maine bhi try kiya tha par nahi mila. Usko support karna chahiye as bade bhai but andar se jal ta hoon. Khush bhi hoon uske liye par dard bhi hai ki main kyun nahi. Yeh feeling shame bhi dila ti hai.

Mere dost... uski jeet tujhe teri haar yaad dila rahi hai. Bade bhai hone ka farz hai khush rehna but andar ka dard chup nahi ho raha. Jealousy aur pyaar dono ek saath, aur upar se guilt ki yeh sochna bhi galat hai. Tune try kiya tha kab?

Do saal pehle. Bahut mehnat ki thi but reject ho gaya. Ab woh wahi achieve kar rahi jo main nahi kar paya. Family mein comparison bhi ho raha hai subtly. Khushi mein shamil hona chahta hoon but muh pe smile laga ke andar jalna... bohot mushkil hai.

Toh do saal purana zakham abhi bhi taza hai aur uski success usko aur khol rahi hai. Family comparisons alag se chubh rahe hain. Smile laga ke acting karna aur andar jalna - kitne din tak kar sakta hai yeh? Usse kabhi bataya hai ki tu struggle kar raha hai ya sab kuch normal pretend kar raha hai?

Bro meri company layoffs kar rahi hai aur main mentally checked out hoon already. Hate my job, toxic environment, underpaid. Part of me wants to get laid off so I get severance and can leave guilt-free. But other part terrified ki job market kharab hai, bills bharne hain. Want to leave but also scared to lose it. Waiting to get fired feels weird.

Damn yaar... wanting to get fired se free hona chahta hai tu but same time terrified bhi hai jobless hone se. Miserable hai wahan par security bhi hai. Freedom chahiye but safety bhi. Dono opposite direction mein kheench rahe hain tujhe. Job kitne time se hate kar raha hai?

Almost a year. Everyday is torture but bills nahi rukenge na. Savings nahi hai ki resign karke risk le sakun. Toh bas waiting hoon ki layoff list mein naam aaye, severance mile aur I can leave without looking irresponsible. Messed up hai yeh thinking.

Toh ek saal se torture jhel raha hai kyunki chhod ne ki himmat nahi. Aur ab wish kar raha hai ki company decision le le tere behalf pe - layoff ho jaye toh blame nahi ayega. Par bro, yeh passive waiting mode mein rehna... yeh bhi ek choice hai jo tu le raha hai. Alternative dhundne ki koshish ki hai ya bas wait kar raha hai?

I think my mom has depression but she refuses to acknowledge it. She's always tired, lost interest in everything she loved, cries randomly. But her generation doesn't believe in mental health. When I suggest therapy, she gets defensive, says I'm calling her crazy. I'm watching her fade away and can't do anything. It's killing me to see her suffer in silence.

Yes bro, I hear you. You can see her drowning but she won't take the hand you're offering. The generational gap around mental health is making her suffer longer. And you're stuck watching, helpless, while she fades. That's brutal. How long has she been like this?

Maybe six months, maybe longer. It was gradual so hard to pinpoint. Dad doesn't notice or doesn't want to notice. My siblings think I'm overreacting. So I'm alone in this, seeing something everyone else is blind to. She needs help but won't accept it from me.

So you're the only one who sees it and that isolation makes it heavier. Everyone else is either blind or in denial, and she's defensive when you try to help. That loneliness of caring when nobody else does - it's exhausting my friend. Have you tried talking to her without using words like therapy or depression? Sometimes the label is what scares them.
I tried saying just talk to someone, a friend, anyone. But she shuts down. Says she's fine, just tired. The denial is strong and I don't know how to break through it without pushing her further away.

So even gentle approaches get shut down. She's built walls around this and you're standing outside them, watching her suffer inside. That helplessness... it hurts. You can't force healing on someone who won't admit they're hurt. But you being there, noticing, caring - that matters even if she can't accept help right now. How are you handling this weight yourself?

Mere best friend ki girlfriend ne mujhe propose kiya. Usne bola ki woh mujhse pyaar karti hai, galat bande ke saath hai. Mujhe bhi ek time pe feelings thi uske liye but maine kabhi kuch nahi kaha kyunki woh dono together the. Ab yeh situation aa gayi. Agar haan bolunga toh dost ka bharosa todunga. Na bolunga toh jo chahiye tha woh chhod dunga.

Uff yaar... jo tu chahta tha woh tere paas aa raha hai but kimat hai teri sabse important dosti. Haan bola toh betrayal, na bola toh regret. Dono options mein tu kuch na kuch khota hai. Usne directly propose kiya ya hint diya?

Direct propose kiya. Boli ki woh relationship mein khush nahi hai mere dost ke saath aur hamesha mujhe hi pasand kiya. Ab main confuse hoon. Feelings toh hain par loyalty bhi hai. Aur yeh bhi sochta hoon ki jo apne boyfriend ko chhod sakti hai, woh mujhe bhi chhod degi future mein.

Toh ab trust issue bhi hai. Agar apne boyfriend ko betray kar sakti hai toh tujhe bhi kar sakti hai. Yeh doubt genuine hai bro. Aur dosti aur feelings dono ek saath rakh nahi sakta. Agar teri jagah pe na hota yeh situation, toh tu kya sochta kisi aur friend ne kiya hota tere saath?

I plagiarized my thesis. Took parts from multiple sources, changed some words, submitted it. Got excellent grades, professor praised it, even suggested publishing. Now they want to publish and that means thorough checks. If caught, I'll be expelled, degree revoked, maybe blacklisted. But if I refuse publishing, they'll wonder why. I'm trapped by my own success from cheating.

Yes my dear friend, your shortcut became a trap. The better you did, the deeper the hole. Now success is your enemy - publishing would expose you but refusing looks suspicious. Every praise is another nail. When did you decide to plagiarize?

I was overwhelmed, deadline was close, I panicked. Thought I'd get away with a passing grade and move on. Never imagined it would be this good or that they'd want to publish. Now my panic decision from months ago is about to destroy everything.

One panic decision is now controlling your entire future. And ironically, if you'd done poorly, you'd be safe. Can you come clean before publishing or does that guarantee the same destruction as getting caught?

Meri shaadi fix ho gayi hai lekin mujhe ladka pasand nahi hai. Ek baar mile hain bas, koi connection nahi bana. Par family pressure itna hai ki mana nahi kar pa rahi hoon. Sab kehte hain achha ladka hai, achha family hai. Par mera dil nahi maanta. Shaadi mein haan kehne se darr lag raha hai aur na kehne se bhi. Dono taraf se trapped feel kar rahi hoon.

Bas mere dost... sab bol rahe hain perfect hai par tera dil khamosh hai. Connection nahi feel kar rahi aur phir bhi sabka pressure push kar raha hai tujhe uss taraf. Haan bhi nahi bol sakti, na bhi nahi. Dono direction mein darr hai. Family ne kab tak time diya hai decide karne ko?

Ek mahina. Unhone sab preparations shuru kar di hain. Relatives ko bata diya, venue dekha. Main chup hoon kyunki lagta hai ab late ho gaya hai mana karne ke liye. Par andar se pata hai ki galat hai yeh sab. Poori zindagi aise jeena padega kya?

Toh ek mahine mein preparations itni aage badh gayi ki ab lagta hai train chhoot gayi. Chup rahi kyunki late lag raha hai, par chup rehne se aur late ho raha hai. Aur woh sawaal - poori zindagi aise jeena - woh khud hi answer hai na? Agar abhi bhi mana karegi toh kya hoga worst case mein?

Bro I cheated on my girlfriend during a trip. One night, drunk, made a terrible mistake. She doesn't know and we're planning to move in together next month. If I tell her, relationship ends and she'll be devastated. If I don't, I'm building our future on a lie. Guilt is eating me alive but confession feels selfish - like I'm just clearing my conscience at her expense.

Damn bro... ek raat ki galti ab poore future ko haunt kar rahi hai. Bataya toh relationship khatam, nahi bataya toh saath jhoot ke saath rahoge. Aur ab yeh bhi lag raha hai ki confession apni guilt kam karne ke liye hai, uske liye nahi. Guilt kitna heavy hai?

Crushing me. Every time she talks about moving in, making plans, I feel sick. She's so excited and I'm sitting here with this secret. Part of me thinks she deserves to know but other part thinks why destroy her happiness for something that meant nothing? It was a mistake, it's over.

Toh uski khushi dekh ke tera guilt aur badh raha hai. Mistake tha, meaning nahi tha, khatam ho gaya - par woh secret nahi gaya. Har plan, har conversation mein yeh beech mein hai. Tu soch, agar koi aur jaan ta hai uss raat ke baare mein? Koi witness? Kyunki agar baad mein pata chala toh aur bhi zyada damage hoga.

My dad is dying of cancer. Doctors gave him six months. He doesn't know - family decided not to tell him to keep his spirits up. But he keeps making long-term plans, talking about things we'll do next year, retirement dreams. I have to smile and play along while knowing none of it will happen. Every conversation is a lie and it's destroying me. Do I tell him the truth or let him die believing in a future that doesn't exist?

Yes my dear friend, that's unbearable. You're living in two realities - the one he believes in and the one you know is coming. Every plan he makes is a knife in your heart because you know it won't happen. And you're forced to smile through it all. Who decided not to tell him?

My mom and the doctors. They think it's kinder. But I see him planning, hoping, and I'm lying to his face every single day. Yesterday he asked me to help him plan a trip for next year. I said yes. I sat there and planned a trip he'll never take. How is that kindness?

So you planned a ghost trip yesterday. Sat there, smiled, agreed, while inside you were screaming that none of this is real. That's not kindness for him - that's torture for you. And maybe for him too, if he suspects something's wrong and everyone's hiding it. Have you told your mom how much this is breaking you?

She says we're protecting him. But who's protecting me from this? I can't sleep, I can't eat. Every moment with him feels like a betrayal. What if he wants to know? What if he'd choose truth over false hope? We took that choice away from him.

You're carrying the weight of this secret alone while everyone else justifies it as protection. But you're right - they took his autonomy away. His right to know, to choose how he spends his last months, to say what needs to be said. And you're drowning in the middle of it. This isn't sustainable my friend. What would happen if you told him, against their wishes?

Mere office mein sexual harassment ho raha hai mujhe but proof nahi hai. Senior constantly inappropriate comments marta hai when we're alone. HR mein complaint karun toh evidence mangenge jo mere paas nahi hai. Aur woh banda connected hai, mera career destroy kar dega agar jhoot bola toh. Chup raho toh har din torture hai, bolo toh job jaane ka darr hai.

Arre... har din uska saamna karna padta hai tujhe aur koi believe bhi nahi karega kyunki proof nahi hai. Bol diya toh career risk hai, chup rahi toh mental health. Trapped completely. Yeh kitne time se chal raha hai?

Teen mahine. Shuru mein ignore karti thi hoping it'll stop but ab worse ho gaya hai. Kabhi kabhi physical bhi ho jata - shoulder touch, back pat jo inappropriate lagte hain but proof kaise karun? Recording toh kar nahi sakti office mein. Ghar aake rona aata hai.

Toh teen mahine se yeh bardasht kar rahi hai aur ab physical bhi hone laga hai. Ghar aake tootna alag trauma hai. Kya koi aur colleague ne notice kiya hai? Koi witness jo teri support kar sake? Aur tune apne close friends ya family ko bataya?

I'm a doctor and I made a mistake during surgery. Patient survived but there were complications that could have been avoided if I hadn't missed something. No one knows it was my error - they think it was just a difficult case. But I know the truth. Patient is suffering because of me and I'm walking around like nothing happened. The guilt is unbearable but admitting it means losing my license, maybe jail. Do I confess or live with this forever?

Listen my dear friend, you're carrying someone else's suffering that you caused, and nobody knows except you. That secret is eating you from inside while the patient deals with complications that were preventable. Confess and your career ends, maybe worse. Stay silent and this guilt follows you forever. When did this happen?

Two months ago. Every day since then has been hell. I see the patient during follow-ups, suffering, and I have to maintain professional distance while inside I'm screaming that it's my fault. My hands shake during surgeries now. I'm terrified I'll make another mistake because I can't focus. The guilt is making me a worse doctor.

So the guilt isn't just moral weight - it's actively making you dangerous to other patients now. Your hands shake, your focus is gone, and you're operating on people while carrying this. That's terrifying. You became a doctor to help people and now you're afraid you'll hurt them. Have you considered that staying silent might lead to more harm than confessing?

Mera beta mujhse baat nahi karta. Ek saal pehle ladai hui thi aur tabse contact kaat diya usne. Main daily phone karta hoon, messages bhejta hoon, koi response nahi. Meri galti thi shayad us waqt, par ab maafi maangna chahta hoon. Uski maa bhi beech mein nahi aati. Dheere dheere toot raha hoon main. Ek beta hai aur woh mujhse door hai.

Mere dost... ek saal se har din phone kar raha hai aur khamoshi milti hai. Har message ek ummeed, har silence ek heartbreak. Galti shayad teri thi par ab maafi ready hai, par woh sunne ko ready nahi. Maa bhi beech mein nahi aa rahi. Akela pad gaya hai tu bilkul. Us ladai mein kya hua tha?

Usne apni pasand ki ladki se shaadi karni thi, main mana kar gaya. Bola different caste, family nahi manegi. Usne meri baat nahi maani, shaadi kar li aur mujhe bola ki main uski zindagi mein nahi chahiye. Tab gusse mein maine bhi kuch bura bol diya. Ab pachtawa hai lekin woh door chala gaya.

Toh tune uski shaadi oppose ki, woh proceed kiya, aur tum dono ne gusse mein kaante boya. Ab tu akela chhoot gaya, pachtawa le ke. Har din phone karta hai hoping ki aaj shayad utha le. Kya kabhi soch ta hai ki teri maa fi actually chahiye ya bas contact chahiye? Kyunki maafi accept karna uske liye bhi heavy hai shayad.

Bro meri girlfriend pregnant hai aur woh rakhna chahti hai. Main bilkul ready nahi hoon - financially, emotionally, career-wise. But yeh uska body hai, uska choice. Agar maine pressure diya abortion ke liye toh I'm the villain. Agar support nahi kiya toh bhi villain. Chaahe kuch bhi karun, galat hi hoga. Completely helpless feel kar raha hoon.

Damn bro... woh ready hai, tu nahi hai, aur decision uska hai ultimately. Support kar toh zimmedaari ki taiyaari nahi, oppose kar toh controlling ban jata hai. Har angle se tu lose karta hai kuch na kuch. Tumne baat ki hai openly ki tu kitna scared hai?

Haan bola. Usne samjha but boli yeh unplanned hai but ho gaya. Woh emotional hai, excited bhi hai. Aur main panic mein hoon. Job stable nahi, savings minimal, we're not even married. Yeh responsibility handle nahi hogi mujhse.

Toh usne sun liya teri fear but uska decision nahi badla. Woh emotionally already attached hai aur tu practically terrified hai. Job unstable, paisa nahi, shaadi bhi nahi - aur 9 mahine baad ek insaan tumhari responsibility hoga. Kya family ko bataya tumne dono ne?

My teenage daughter told me she's gay. I want to be supportive but I come from a conservative background where this is unacceptable. My family will disown her if they find out. My husband is against it too. I love my daughter but I'm scared of losing my family, my community, everything I know. She needs me but I'm too scared to fully stand by her. I'm failing her.

I hear you my friend. Your daughter trusted you with this truth and you want to hold her, but you're also terrified of what it costs - your family, your community, your husband's support. You're stuck between loving her and losing everything else. That fear is real and heavy. What did you say when she told you?

I said I love her but asked her to keep it private. Not tell anyone, especially family. She looked so hurt but agreed. Now I see her withdrawing, becoming quiet. She needed acceptance and I gave her conditional love. I'm disgusted with myself but I don't know how to be braver.

So you gave her love with a lock on it - love in private but hide in public. And now she's shrinking, going quiet, learning that her truth is shameful. You can see the damage happening but fear is paralyzing you. Your husband knows about this or you're keeping it from him too?

He doesn't know. She asked me not to tell him because she knows he'll react badly. So now I'm keeping her secret from him, keeping my fear from her, and drowning in the middle. I don't know who I am anymore - the mother who protects her child or the wife who maintains peace.
